commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh When I shall bring you down with them that descend into the pit, with the people of old, and shall set you in the lowest parts of the earth, in places desolate of old, with them that go down to the pit, that you be not inhabited; and I shall give glory in the land of the living; Everlasting: in the grave, till the day of judgment, Psalm xlviii. , and Wisdom xii. Living, assigned to Israel, (chap. ; Calmet) where holy people adore the true God, and shall rise to life eternal. (Menochius).
